reason: Core now proves local JSON vector query, hybrid keyword/vector retrieval, metadata-filtered vector query, and stale vector index detection without real LLM/API/network. External vector database adapters remain future/disabled and must not be claimed as implemented.

hybrid_keyword_vector_retrieval_status.reason: Hybrid retrieval combines deterministic local vector similarity and keyword scores over local JSON vector records.

embedding_provider_configuration.reason: Core can generate deterministic local fake embeddings for tests; live providers remain optional.

vector_db_adapter_status.reason: External vector DB write/query adapters are not part of the local v4 gate and must not be claimed.

claim_verification.reason: Local claim verification exists; external retrieval verification remains out of current implementation.

freshness_contradiction_accuracy_scoring.reason: Contradictory sources produce warning/review, not pass.

incremental_update_or_rebuild_policy.reason: Local vector staleness report marks missing/orphan/count mismatch records and recommends rebuild.

must_not_claim: real live embedding provider acceptance completed in this Codex process
recommended_fix: No P0 remains for local vector/hybrid/index readiness. Keep external vector DB adapters marked future/disabled until real write/query/filter tests exist.
